texto: When you see me in a scarf you may think “Oh, she went to some trouble there.” But no, when I wear a scarf it means "this grey blouse was unwrinkled and those mocha pants make my behind look fine and voila I have a vivid grey and brown silk scarf which means I have transformed self from bone lazy to coordinated accessory maven.(Maid in Waiting publish date June 2014)
explicacao: Citação de Bridget Allison sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “When you see me in a scarf you may think “Oh, she went to some trouble there.” But no, when I wea…” articula reflexao, female-sleuth, humor em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e humor.

texto: Awoke to find three vultures sitting on the fence. Realizing they were a portent of impending death I shot them.
